nasb.text: A large crowd followed Him, because they saw the signs which He was performing on those who were sick.

esv.text: And a large crowd was following him, because they saw the signs that he was doing on the sick.

cnv.text: 有一大群人，因為看見了他在病人身上所行的神蹟，就跟隨了他。

ccb.text: 许多人因为见过耶稣治病的神迹，就跟随了祂。

csbs.text: 有一大群人，因为看到他在病人身上所行的神迹，就跟随他。
